meaning: n.格架,(墙、篱、凉亭等的)格子v.装设格子架或格子棚
examples: The vine wound about the trellis.
With the wreathed trellis of a working brain.
All three suites have a balcony and a metal trellis for climbing plants.
Every house has a trellis of vines outside it, with grapes ripening for the yearly pressing.
The trellis underpinning such rosy reckonings is a booming world economy awash with cheap money.
